_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the review and approval process for cyberspace operations Review and Approval Process of Cyber Operations (RAP-CO) process.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stakeholder coordination, assessment execution, and decision documentation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-006 (AG, cosine: 0.389), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.376).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [review]. DCWF-only terms [approval, co, cyber, cyberspace, knowledge, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.851, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of the review and approval process for cyberspace operations Review an" and "Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stak" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.391 ≈ STS 0.396 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [review] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [review]. DCWF-only: [approval, co, cyber, cyberspace, knowledge, operations]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution].
